working_source_description: Greg Mathias did not know anything about Harry Leary’s “prior” life other than what he saw in the magazines. He didn’t know Harry had a sister, daughter, or son. Greg believes he was Harry’s safezone or sounding board, and Greg like to help Harry put things into perspective.
